title: The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Field Guide}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:TheWildlifeofStarWars.jpg]] |title=''The Wildlife of Star Wars:
A Field Guide'' |author=[[Terryl Whitlatch]]
[[Bob Carrau]] |cover artist= |illustrator=[[Terryl Whitlatch]] |editor= |publisher=[[Chronicle Books]] |release date=November [[2001]]{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/ref/news20010702.html|text=Explore the Wildlife of ''Star Wars''}} |type=Hardcover |pages= |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=0-811-82869-7 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide''''' is a [[2001]] book written by [[Terryl Whitlatch]] and [[Bob Carrau]] and published by [[Chronicle Books]]. The book details the wildlife of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] up to and including [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. Information on the habits and habitats of each species is included, and many species are broken down and detailed in artist renditions. ==Publisher's summary== ''The ''Star Wars'' universe is a vast and varied place, populated with an amazing array of creatures. These fascinating fauna have been captured here in the only comprehensive annotated field journal of its kind. Many years of extensive study and on-site observation have gone into these renderings, and great risk taken to learn about the natural habitats of all of the creatures. From the ice fields of Hoth and the pastures of Naboo to the concrete jungle of Coruscant and the intense heat and wind of Tatooine, identify and learn about the mating habits, feeding patterns, herding instincts, and defense mechanisms of these incredible beings.'' ''This extraordinary field guide provides the ultimate look at the wildlife of ''Star Wars''.'' ==Contents== *'''Introduction''' *'''[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]''' *'''[[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]''' *'''[[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]''' *'''[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]: [[Theed/Legends|Theedside]]''' *'''[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]: The Abyss''' *'''[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]: The [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] Swamp''' *'''[[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]''' *'''[[Endor/Legends|Endor]]''' *'''[[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]''' *'''[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]''' *'''[[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]''' *"'''New Arrivals'''" *'''Index & Comparative Size Chart''' ==Continuity== [[In-universe]], this guide's research was carried out and written by [[Lyrre T'enna]]. Written backwards, "Lyrre T" is the first name of the guide's real-world coauthor [[Terryl Whitlatch]], who was also a creature concept artist for [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The
